general_advisory: Seeing the onset of monsoon events, prepare the nursery beds with raised bed method. Weed infestation may be seen by the light shower of rainfall, so ploughing with power-tiller or tractor to reduce weed infestation. Sowing of turmeric should be completed before the onset of monsoon. Do not let the cattle roam around in the mid-day and during lightning. The light rainfall would not be enough for the seed bed preparation and subsequent transplanting, so preserve the rainwater accordingly.

advisory: Apply 12.5 t/ha of FYM or compost during last ploughing.
Spray any of the following insecticide
Rice nursery beds should be prepared for seeding preparation in rice.
Before nursery sowing, treat the seeds with Carbendazim or Mancozeb @2gram/kg of seed.
Spray mancozeb @ 2 g/l or copper oxychloride @ 2.5 g/l.
Protect the cattle from scorching heat and during thunderstorm lightning, don’t let them roam around.
Keep the shed clean and dry.
